# Project Instructions – zqremovals

## Overview
This project is a modern, high-conversion removalist website for an Australian business (zqremovals.au).  
The goal is to attract traffic, build trust instantly, and convert visitors into quote requests.

## Tech Stack
- Vite + React + TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS
- Framer Motion (for animations)
- Mobile-first responsive design

## Design Philosophy
- Premium, clean, and modern (like a $50K agency build)
- Strong visual hierarchy
- Smooth animations (not excessive)
- Focus on conversion (quote requests)

## UX Goals
- Users should immediately understand:
  - What service is offered
  - Why this business is better
  - How to get a quote in < 5 seconds

## Key Features to Always Prioritize
- Sticky "Get Quote" CTA button
- Fast-loading pages
- Mobile-first layout
- Trust elements (reviews, badges, guarantees)
- Simple forms (minimal fields)

## Sections Required
- Hero section (clear headline + CTA)
- Services overview
- Why choose us
- Testimonials / reviews
- Pricing hint (optional, not full breakdown)
- Quote form (main conversion point)
- Footer with contact details

## Copywriting Style
- Confident, premium, and trustworthy
- Avoid generic phrases like “best service”
- Use clear, benefit-driven language
- Example tone:
  - “Fast, careful, and stress-free moves across Sydney”
  - “Professional movers you can trust with your valuables”

## Performance Rules
- Avoid heavy libraries unless necessary
- Optimize images
- Keep bundle size minimal
- Use lazy loading where possible

## Animation Rules
- Use Framer Motion
- Keep animations subtle and smooth
- Focus on:
  - Fade-in
  - Slide-up
  - Hover effects

## Code Quality
- Use clean, modular components
- Follow consistent naming conventions
- Use TypeScript types properly
- Avoid unnecessary complexity

## SEO Requirements
- Proper meta tags
- Semantic HTML
- Fast load speed
- Keywords:
  - "removalists"
  - "moving service"
  - "Sydney removals"

## Conversion Optimization
- CTA visible at all times
- Reduce friction in forms
- Use urgency subtly:
  - “Limited slots available”
- Highlight trust:
  - insured
  - experienced
  - reliable

## Do NOT
- Do not overcomplicate UI
- Do not use outdated design styles
- Do not add unnecessary steps before quote form
- Do not clutter the interface

## Goal
Maximize conversions while maintaining a premium brand feel.
